recommendations.title: Future World
recommendations.overview: A young boy searches a future world wasteland for a rumored cure for his dying mother.

recommendations.title: GoldenEye
recommendations.overview: When a powerful satellite system falls into the hands of Alec Trevelyan, AKA Agent 006, a former ally-turned-enemy, only James Bond can save the world from a dangerous space weapon that -- in one short pulse -- could destroy the earth! As Bond square

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Alien Hunter
recommendations.overview: Government agents find evidence of extraterrestrial life at the South Pole.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead
recommendations.overview: A young boy finds himself pursued by two assassins in the Montana wilderness, with a survival expert determined to protect him, and a forest fire threatening to consume them all.

recommendations.title: Ra.One
recommendations.overview: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Rapid Fire
recommendations.overview: College student Jake Lo is pursued by smugglers, mobsters and crooked federal agents after he witnesses a murder by a Mafia kingpin.
